{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = System Spirit
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Worlds]] whose [[World Spirits]] extend protection over entire star systems are sometimes called System Spirits.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
